title: Got a different result by adding write_verilog right after read_verilog

features.name: addition_result_assigned_to_wider_register
features.description: Code should include addition operations where the result (max 4+4+4=12) is assigned to an 8-bit register, making upper bits always zero

features.name: multiple_additions_in_always_block
features.description: Code should include an always block with multiple addition operations on the same clock edge
